feedback: The team culture is excellent and I feel genuinely supported. Code reviews are thorough and I learn something new every sprint.
Sprint planning feels rushed and we never have time to address tech debt. It's frustrating and unsustainable.
Great collaboration across the team. Would love more visibility into the product roadmap and strategic direction.
Promotion criteria are unclear. I have no idea what's expected to move from senior to staff level.
Overwhelmed with the number of campaigns. We need better prioritization and clearer ownership across channels.
Love the creative freedom here. Better performance dashboards would help the team iterate faster and smarter.
Cross-functional alignment with sales is poor. We launch campaigns they don't know about. Communication needs work.
Disconnected from leadership. Town halls are too high-level and we never get real answers to direct questions.
Quotas feel unrealistic this quarter. The market is tough and we need more enablement and better tooling.
Great team and supportive manager, but the CRM crashes constantly. Incredibly frustrating to work with every day.
SDR training program needs significant work. I felt completely thrown into the deep end my first month here.
Team is hitting numbers and morale is high. The new comp plan is fair and motivating for the whole team.
Workload is sustainable and the team is collaborative. Genuinely one of the best places I've ever worked.
Need more headcount in recruiting. Running 80 open reqs across 2 recruiters is unsustainable and leads to errors.
Leadership trusts the team and gives real autonomy to do good work. Compensation could be more competitive.
On-call rotation is brutal. Three production incidents this month and I'm completely burnt out. Need more support.
Onboarding was excellent. My buddy was incredibly helpful and I felt productive and confident within two weeks.
Love working on hard problems with smart people. The team dynamic is positive and collaborative. Very happy here.
Manager changes have been disruptive and demoralizing. Three different managers in nine months is too much.
The team is talented and creative. Better cross-team communication would make our campaigns significantly more effective.
Compensation is below market rate. Two peers left last month for higher offers. Leadership needs to address this urgently.
Pipeline visibility has improved a lot. The new forecasting tool is great and saves hours each week.
Excellent team dynamic and strong leadership. We need clearer career paths for individual contributor growth.
Happy with the role and impact. The work is meaningful and I feel connected to the mission every day.
Team has grown a lot and it shows. The engineering culture around quality and learning is exceptional.
Roadmap visibility improved. Still want faster feedback loops between product and engineering on priorities.
New campaign workflow is much better. Attribution reporting would complete the picture for measuring impact.
Sales and marketing alignment is improving. Joint planning sessions have made a real positive difference.
Enablement content has improved. Still need better tooling — the CRM issues are killing our productivity.
Team culture is strong. Great manager. Starting to feel like the compensation gap is less of an issue.
Another great quarter. The team is doing exceptional work. Morale is high across the whole department.
Proud of what this team accomplishes. Clear values, smart colleagues, impactful work. Very fulfilling role.
